title: AAS utils
description: Shared sub-schemas reused by every AAS per-family document (operationalAmplifier, comparator, instrumentationAmplifier, differenceAmplifier, programmableGainAmplifier, buffer, sampleHold, analogSwitch, multiplexer, adc, dac). Identification (part/thermal/mechanical) mirrors the SAS pattern and reuses the PEAS datasheetInfo* bases. The electrical CORES (amplifierCommon, switchCore, converterDynamics) hold the parameters that genuinely recur across several families; each family file extends the relevant core by allOf and closes it with unevaluatedProperties:false, then adds its own family-specific electricals. Family-specific electricals that no other family shares live in the per-family files, exactly as SAS keeps per-device electricals out of utils.

part.title: analogPart
part.description: Part identification — shared across all analog-IC families. Extends the PEAS datasheetInfoPartBase.

package.description: Manufacturer's exact package designation (e.g. 'SOT-23-5', 'MSOP-8'). Complements case, which holds the generic industry code.

thermal.title: analogThermal
thermal.description: Thermal section — extends the PEAS datasheetInfoThermal (operating-temperature range) with the junction-to-ambient resistance and absolute maximum dissipation common to packaged analog ICs.

thermalResistanceJunctionAmbient.description: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance R_th(j-a), in K/W.

maximumPowerDissipation.description: Absolute maximum power dissipation at 25 C, in W.

mechanical.title: analogMechanical
mechanical.description: Mechanical specs — extends PEAS datasheetInfoMechanical with a package case field.

case.description: Package name (SOIC-8, SOT-23-5, etc.) — mirrors part.case for convenience.

supply.title: supply
supply.description: Power-supply operating window, shared by every family. The min/max span is the total (V+)-(V-); a part that runs off one rail sets dualSupply=false. Per-channel quiescent current is stored (device total = quiescentCurrentPerChannel x numberOfChannels) to avoid double-modelling a redundant total.

minimumSupplyVoltage.description: Minimum total operating supply voltage (V+)-(V-), in V.

maximumSupplyVoltage.description: Maximum total operating supply voltage (V+)-(V-), in V.

dualSupply.description: True if the part is specified for bipolar (dual, +/-) supplies; false if single-supply.

quiescentCurrentPerChannel.description: No-load quiescent supply current per channel, in A.

shutdownSupplyCurrent.description: Supply current in shutdown/power-down, in A. Absent if the part has no shutdown.

gainPoint.title: gainPoint
gainPoint.description: One (gain, value) sample of a gain-dependent specification (e.g. -3 dB bandwidth or CMRR at a stated closed-loop gain). Used where a single scalar would be lossy because the spec varies strongly with gain (instrumentation amps, PGAs).

gain.description: Closed-loop gain at which the value is specified, in V/V.

value.description: The specified value at this gain. Unit is fixed by the field that holds the array.

amplifierCommon.title: amplifierCommon
amplifierCommon.description: Electrical parameters shared by the linear-amplifier families (operationalAmplifier, instrumentationAmplifier, differenceAmplifier, programmableGainAmplifier, buffer). Open base: a family extends it by allOf and closes the composed object with unevaluatedProperties:false. Derivable quantities are deliberately omitted (no total supply current; no SINAD/ENOB).

inputOffsetVoltage.description: Input offset voltage V_OS (max), in V.

inputOffsetVoltageDrift.description: Input offset voltage drift dV_OS/dT, in V/K.

inputBiasCurrent.description: Input bias current I_B, in A.

inputOffsetCurrent.description: Input offset current I_OS, in A. Not derivable from I_B; kept separate.

commonModeRejectionRatio.description: Common-mode rejection ratio CMRR, in dB.

powerSupplyRejectionRatio.description: Power-supply rejection ratio PSRR, in dB.

slewRate.description: Output slew rate SR, in V/s.

voltageNoiseDensity.description: Input-referred voltage noise density e_n, in V/sqrt(Hz).

voltageNoiseDensityFrequency.description: Frequency at which voltageNoiseDensity is specified, in Hz (typically 1000).

switchCore.title: switchCore
switchCore.description: Electrical parameters shared identically by the analogSwitch and multiplexer families (distributors sell them in one category with one filter schema). Open base: each extends it by allOf + unevaluatedProperties:false. The mux family adds only channel-count / mux-ratio / break-before-make on top.

onResistanceFlatness.description: On-resistance flatness: max-min R_ON over the signal range, in Ohm. Distinct from match.

onResistanceMatch.description: On-resistance match between channels in one package, in Ohm. Distinct from flatness.

offLeakageCurrent.description: Source/drain OFF-state leakage current, in A.

chargeInjection.description: Charge injected onto the load when the switch toggles Q_INJ, in C.

turnOnTime.description: Control-edge to switch-closed time t_ON, in s.

turnOffTime.description: Control-edge to switch-open time t_OFF, in s.

offIsolation.description: Off-isolation (signal attenuation through an open switch) at a stated frequency, in dB.

crosstalk.description: Channel-to-channel crosstalk at a stated frequency, in dB.

converterDynamics.title: converterDynamics
converterDynamics.description: AC/dynamic performance shared by ADC and DAC families. Only the independent metrics are stored: SNR, THD and SFDR. SINAD = power-sum(SNR, THD) and ENOB = (SINAD - 1.76)/6.02 are DERIVED and never stored. SFDR is kept because the worst spur need not be a harmonic captured by THD.

signalToNoiseRatio.description: Signal-to-noise ratio SNR (harmonics excluded), in dB.

totalHarmonicDistortion.description: Total harmonic distortion THD, in dB.

spuriousFreeDynamicRange.description: Spurious-free dynamic range SFDR, in dB.

measurementFrequency.description: Input/output signal frequency at which SNR/THD/SFDR are specified, in Hz.

digitalInterface.title: digitalInterface
digitalInterface.description: Host digital control/data interface of a programmable analog IC (PGA, ADC, DAC). An array because some parts offer more than one (e.g. parallel or pin-strap).

referenceSource.title: referenceSource
referenceSource.description: Voltage-reference source for a data converter.

inputType.title: inputType
inputType.description: Analog input/output signal configuration for converters and switches.

pinout.title: pinout
pinout.description: Per-pin function map — one entry per package pin/ball. This is the deciding axis for IC interchangeability: same package does NOT imply same pinout (three mutually incompatible SOIC-8 single-op-amp pinouts exist: all-NC vs pin-8 disable vs pin-1/8 offset-trim). Function is a normalized vocabulary so a machine can compare two parts pin-by-pin; name preserves the datasheet's own label. Register-map compatibility is deliberately out of scope — it is not a parametric property.

pin.description: Pin number or ball designator, as printed ('1', 'A2').

outputStage.description: Output driver topology, for output pins where it decides drop-in compatibility (open-drain needs a pull-up and fights a push-pull swap).
